overall.description: A stationary first-person view of a futuristic urban street corner in a video game, featuring large animated digital billboards cycling through advertisements on a commercial building. The scene is set in a cyberpunk-style city during daytime with mixed natural and neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic commercial street corner with dynamic digital advertising

events.description: middle digital billboard transitions to black screen then displays red circular logo
top digital billboard changes from beauty advertisement to sandblast brand advertisement
billboards cycle through additional advertisement transitions and animations

agents.ego_description: standing stationary at street level observing the animated digital billboards on the building corner

entered.detail: large upper digital screen displaying cycling advertisements including beauty products and sandblast brand
mid-level digital screen showing animated advertisements with red and black graphics
vertical digital screen on building corner displaying fashion advertisements
futuristic directional signpost indicating City Center and Corpo Plaza
tropical vegetation visible behind the directional sign
multi-story modern building with glass and concrete exterior housing the digital displays

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a stationary position at a futuristic urban street corner, focusing on a commercial building covered in large digital billboards. The billboards cycle through various advertisements including beauty products, corporate branding, and fashion imagery. A directional sign for City Center stands to the left, and the scene is devoid of pedestrians or vehicles, emphasizing the cyberpunk architecture and dynamic advertising.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a stationary first-person perspective of a futuristic urban street corner dominated by the shifting glow of massive digital advertisements. It begins by focusing on a commercial building where large billboards cycle through a sequence of beauty products and corporate branding. As the imagery transitions, the displays shift toward high-fashion visuals, casting dynamic light across the surrounding cyberpunk architecture. The scene remains still, emphasizing the contrast between the vibrant, changing screens and the empty street marked by a solitary directional sign for the City Center.
